data.body: Plan review round 4 disposition (signed PASS, 0 blocking, 4 surfaced advisories): accepted P6 by splitting the compound contract/rollback documentation criterion into independently verifiable ACs; accepted the child regression-guard advisory by adding test_schema_outputs.py to e622 and 568c ACs plus verify metadata; rejected the repeated first-compaction advisory as already remediated by the explicit three-state matrix and unconditional full-downgrade compaction prohibition; rejected a new admin verifier/compactor feature flag as disproportionate scope for this MVP and clarified the safety contract instead: no writer-only binary mode, roll forward for attribution defects, and stop every rebar compact invocation for the entire full-downgrade window. Also accepted the cross-child coaching by pinning _project_legacy_creation_channel(state: dict) -> None and its exact no-op/inferred/unknown behavior, plus function-local absolute import placement in _event_meta.
